LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF RAISES A TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 THROUGH THE SMITH DECLARATION. THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. A TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT IS RAISED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 THROUGH THE MAY 4, 2006 LETTER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
